title: Kitchens & Kitchen Renovations
heroAlt: Premium custom kitchen renovation in Willoughby
metaTitle: Kitchens & Kitchen Renovations Sydney | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Custom kitchens and kitchen renovations across Sydney with tailored layouts, appliance integration, pantry planning, joinery profiles and real project examples from Willoughby, Darlinghurst, Epping and beyond.
intro: A good kitchen renovation is not just about replacing cabinets. It is about getting the layout, storage, appliance positions, circulation and finish schedule right so the room feels easier to use every day. We build kitchens that are tailored to the way the household cooks, stores and moves through the space, whether the brief is a full renovation or a focused cabinetry upgrade.
includedTitle: What a kitchen project can include
included: Custom kitchen joinery planned to the actual room dimensions, circulation and working zones
Pantry, tall storage and drawer layouts designed around day-to-day kitchen use rather than catalogue assumptions
Integrated appliance planning for fridges, ovens, dishwashers, rangehoods and microwave towers
Shaker, slim shaker, finger-pull and cleaner flat-panel kitchen fronts depending on the look you want
Kitchen renovation coordination around cabinetry, splashbacks, benchtops and how the joinery ties into adjoining spaces
Joinery detail that keeps the finished kitchen feeling considered from every angle, not just from the hero shot

featureBlocks.title: Layout first
featureBlocks.text: The best kitchens start with the plan. We think through island sizing, pinch points, door swings, appliance clearances and pantry access before the finishes take over the conversation.

featureBlocks.title: Profiles & finish direction
featureBlocks.text: Some homes need a slim shaker kitchen with more texture and depth. Others suit a quieter flat-panel or finger-pull elevation. The key is matching the joinery style to the home instead of forcing a trend onto it.

featureBlocks.title: Renovation-ready detailing
featureBlocks.text: On renovation projects the cabinetry has to do more than fit the wall. It often sets the standard for the whole room, so we pay attention to bulkheads, panel returns, stone alignment and how the kitchen connects to the wider living area.

materialsTitle: Kitchen finishes clients commonly ask for
materials: Painted polyurethane for a more tailored, furniture-like kitchen finish
Timber-look laminates and woodmatt textures where warmth is important in open-plan homes
Stone splashbacks and benchtops to create a more resolved focal wall and durable work surface
Integrated pantry storage, drawer packs and tall cabinetry planned around real grocery and appliance storage

beforeAfter.title: Before & after
beforeAfter.text: Willoughby shows how much difference the right joinery profile, pantry planning and finish schedule can make. The room moved from a dated kitchen to a sharper, more resolved open-plan space.
beforeAfter.beforeAlt: Willoughby kitchen before renovation and new joinery
beforeAfter.afterAlt: Willoughby custom kitchen after renovation — shaker cabinetry, marble island benchtop and stone splashback

faqs.question: Can you quote both a new custom kitchen and a full kitchen renovation?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can quote kitchen joinery on its own or as part of a wider renovation scope, depending on what is changing in the room.

faqs.question: Do you build shaker kitchens as well as more modern styles?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work across shaker, handleless shaker, finger-pull and more pared-back contemporary kitchens depending on the brief and the home.

faqs.question: Can integrated appliances be planned from the start?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Appliance positioning is one of the most important early decisions because it affects cabinetry runs, clearances and how seamless the finished kitchen feels.

faqs.question: Can I start with plans, site photos or inspiration images?
faqs.answer: Yes. Plans, photos and reference images are all useful for shaping the kitchen scope and giving clearer quote guidance.

ctaTitle: Planning a new kitchen or kitchen renovation?
ctaText: Send your plans, measurements or site photos and we can help shape the cabinetry scope, finish direction and next step for your kitchen.
